# MLDecisionTreeClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.dataFrame(_:)

**Case**

Validation data provided in a DataFrame.

## Declaration

```swift
case dataFrame(DataFrame)
```

## Specifying validation data

- **MLDecisionTreeClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.split(strategy:)**: Generate validation data by splitting the training dataset. This is the default.
- **MLDecisionTreeClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.table(_:)**: Set validation data from the MLDataTable provided.
- **MLDecisionTreeClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.none**: Do not set validation data.
